issues.description: Test page button hrefs use '#' placeholder. In a real 404 template deployment, buttons should link to actual URLs (e.g., homepage). This is expected test page behavior and not a block defect.
issues.fix: When deploying to the 404 template, configure button URLs to point to real destinations.

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors (Error404 files clean)
Block registers correctly: takt/error404, takt-theme-template, multiple: false
All 4 attributes correctly defined in block.json with proper types and defaults
6 block instances on test page, all inside demo-container wrappers
Empty state: heading-only renders correctly without description or button group
Empty state: all-empty-URL buttons correctly hide the button group
Single-button filtering: secondary and tertiary with empty URL suppressed by ThemeButton guard
Long content (500+ char description, extended heading) renders without overflow or truncation
No horizontal overflow at 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px
TSX and PHP produce identical HTML structure (all 8 automated sync checks pass)
No $attributes['key'] extraction anti-pattern in PHP template
PHP docblock with @var annotations present for auto-extracted variables
aria-labelledby on section correctly references h1 id via theme_block_region_id()
Heading uses h1 tag (correct for page-level 404 heading)
No markup duplication for responsive layout
No JavaScript errors on page load
No animations — prefers-reduced-motion not required
mt-(--header-height) class present on all instances for header offset
text-accent class applied to all h1 headings
multiple: false confirmed in block.json
